summary: Backend API testing for store toggle status and homepage data features. All 18 tests passed (100%). Features tested: 1) Manual store open/close toggle API, 2) Store status API, 3) Unified homepage data API with caching, 4) Stores list showing manual close status as 'مغلق مؤقتاً'.
critical_code_review_comments: Store toggle status API correctly updates manual_close field in database
Homepage data API properly implements caching with 60-second TTL
Store status endpoint correctly checks manual_close before working hours
Stores list correctly shows 'مغلق مؤقتاً' for manually closed stores
context_for_next_testing_agent: Store toggle and homepage data APIs are working correctly. Store toggle requires food_seller auth. Tested: POST /api/food/stores/{id}/toggle-status (close/open), GET /api/food/stores/{id}/status, GET /api/products/homepage-data, GET /api/food/stores (list with status).

tests: Returns all required sections (categories, ads, sponsored_products, flash_sale, flash_products, best_sellers, new_arrivals, settings)
Shows manual close status as 'مغلق مؤقتاً'
Stores sorted with open stores first
